arts.ttl: Manchester City vs Inter Milan – Match Preview
arts.sum: Manchester City entertain Inter Milan in Manchester on Wednesday night, in what is a repeat of the 2023 Champions League final. This week could have huge ramifications for both teams, as City play Arsenal on the weekend whilst Inter compete in the Milan derby.
